name: create_metric
description: Create a guarded-release metric in LaunchDarkly (the app/data-plane project) off a custom event. The metric measures one category of the flagged change during a guarded release. You must FIRST instrument the matching event in code (a LaunchDarkly `track(event_key, …)` call on the path the flag wraps, via edit_file) so the metric has data once live. Idempotent: re-creating an existing key is a no-op. After it succeeds the metrics_created/metric_keys tags are updated for you.

category.description: error/latency = lower is better; business = higher is better

event_key.description: The custom event name your track() call emits, e.g. fact-endpoint-error

randomization_unit.description: Unit the metric is measured on; MUST match the flag rollout's unit. Default 'user'.

unit.description: Numeric unit for latency metrics (default 'ms'); ignored for error/business.

tags.description: Extra tags (auto-factory tags are added automatically)
